title: No Block Left Behind
description: Adds block variants for the blocks that don't have them
body:
## What is No Block Left Behind?
No Block Left Behind adds over 100 new blocks to Minecraft, that fill in the gaps in Minecraft's building blocks. From chiseled calcite to red terracotta walls, it adds a new array of things for you to build with. It fits in seamlessly with Minecraft's creative menu. No extra creative tabs here. It's like it was a real block all along. This mod is still in beta so there's way more to come. If you have suggestions post them on the GitHub page.

## Current additions:
- End Stone Slab, Stairs, and Walls
- Regular Deepslate Slabs, Stairs, and Walls
- Netherrack Slab, Stairs, and Walls
- Nether Brick Fences
- Red Nether Brick Fences and Fence Gates
- Charcoal Blocks
- Polished Andesite/Diorite/Granite Walls
- Smooth Stone Stairs and Walls
- Stone Walls
- Calcite Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Chiseled Calcite and Chiseled Calcite Bricks
- Calcite Bricks, and Calcite Brick Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Polished Calcite, and Polished Calcite Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Polished/Smooth/Regular Basalt block variants
- Polished Basalt Bricks
- Slabs, stairs, and walls for all 16 kinds of concrete and 17 kinds of terracotta

## Roadmap:
### The roadmap or planned additions for NBLB may change over time.

- Mud Brick expansion
- Dripstone expansion
- Andesite/Granite/Diorite expansion
- Concrete/terracotta bricks/shingles
- Ore block variants
- Netherrack expansion
- Prismarine/Dark Prismarine expansion
- Possible combinations of building blocks (Limestone/Marble/Jasper/Shale)
- Dirt slabs/Packed dirt
- Compressed or crated sugar, sugar cane, wheat, bread, or other crops
